aborted(CalibrationCapabilityAbortReason) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapabilityCallbacks
Signals that the calibration has been aborted.

Signals that the calibration has been aborted by the audio device.
acceptProfile() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Accept the profile retrieved from device

The method can be used after a new or differing profile has been fetched from the
device.
activate() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Activate audiosphere IR

An asynchronous request to activate audiosphere IR.
activate() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBassBoostCapability
Activate the bass boost.

An asynchronous request to activate the bass boost.
activate() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Activate the detail enhancer.

An asynchronous request to activate the detail enhancer.
activate() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Activate the equalizer.

An asynchronous request to activate the equalizer.
activate() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Activate the spatializer.

An asynchronous request to activate the spatializer.
activate(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
This function is deprecated in favour set_remote_profile and
activate_personal_sound. This will be removed in a upcoming release.

activateAutoReset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Activates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

Auto-reset automatically resets the head tracking orientation when the user
has remained still for a defined period of time.

An asynchronous request to activate auto reset for head tracking.
activateFeedbackSuppression() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Activate Feedback Suppression

Note: This function requires a license.
activateNoiseSuppressor() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Activate Noise Suppressor

Note: This function requires a license.
activatePersonalSound() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Activates personal sound using the current remote profile

A successful operation will result in an event in the observer's property_changed()
method.

Aspen - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Helper class for getting AspenManager as a singleton in an Android environment.

AspenManager - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
The AspenManager class

This is the main class of the Aspen library.

audioDeviceSupported(int) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
Returns whether an audio device is supported by APS.

This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
supported by Aspen, given its model id.
audioDeviceSupported(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
Returns whether a BR/EDR device is supported by APS.

This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
supported by Aspen, given its BR/EDR UUID.

AudiosphereIrConfig - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Configuration for the Audiosphere feature.

The AudiosphereIrConfig class encapsulates all parameters required to configure the
IAudiosphereIrCapability.

Changes to an instance of this class do not take effect immediately.
AudiosphereIrConfig() - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Construct a new default AudiosphereIrConfig object.

Construct a new AudiosphereIrConfig object with data.

AUTHORIZATION_DENIED - com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause
The device did not accept our authorization keys.
This is not recoverable, something is wrong in the configuration.

createProfile(String, EqualizerConfiguration, EqualizerPositions) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerProfileService
Create a new equalizer profile object with the provided information

This is a synchronous request which may take some time due to saving to disk.

Creates a new EqualizerProfile object and stores it in persistent storage.

Deprecated.
Renamed to deactivate_personal_sound to make it more consistent with
the activate counterpart.

This method deactivates the current profile on the connected remote device.

deactivateAutoReset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Deactivates the auto-reset feature for head tracking

NOTE: Only supported if is_auto_reset_supported returns true.

See activate_auto_reset for more info.

An asynchronous request to deactivate auto reset for head tracking.

Environment - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
The Environment class

The environment class holds the environment variables, such as manufacturer,
model, os and os version.
Environment(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.Environment
 
Environment(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.Environment
 
EqualizerConfiguration - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Represents a configuration for an equalizer.

The configuration contains 9 gains for different frequency bands.
EqualizerConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerConfiguration
Construct a new default Equalizer Configuration object.

The default configuration sets all gains to zero.
EqualizerConfiguration(byte, byte, byte, byte, byte, byte, byte, byte, byte) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerConfiguration
Construct a new Equalizer Configuration object with data.

EqualizerConfiguration(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerConfiguration
 
EqualizerPos - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
One position's X+Y values in a [-1, -1, 1, 1] coordinate system
EqualizerPos() - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPos
Construct a new default Equalizer Position object

Default constructor sets positions to zero.
EqualizerPos(float, float) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPos
Construct a new Equalizer Position object

Any values outside the limits will be clamped.
0.0 <= X <= 1.0
-1.0 <= Y <= 1.0

EqualizerPos(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPos
 
EqualizerPositions - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Stores positions for EQ graph handles/gain tilt

Used to store positions for handles that make up an EQ graph curve as
well as a value of a gain tilt.
EqualizerPositions() - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPositions
Construct a new default Equalizer Positions object.

Default constructor sets all positions to zero.
EqualizerPositions(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPositions
 
EqualizerPositions(List<EqualizerPos>, float) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPositions
Construct a new EqualizerPositions object from a vector of positions and a tilt gain handle

EqualizerProfile - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Equalizer Profile that contains more than just an EqualizerConfiguration

Used to be able to store EqualizerConfiguration along with a name.
EqualizerProfile(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
 
EqualizerProfile(String, String, EqualizerConfiguration, EqualizerPositions) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Construct a new Equalizer Profile object with all possible data

Sets up an equalizer profile with id, name, eq_config and eq_positions.
The id is on a standard UUID hexadecimal format.
exportProfile(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Export a hearing profile

Exports a hearing profile that can be imported in another Aspen instance.

F

fillToneGeneratorAudioStreamBuffer(IntVector) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVirtualDeviceService
Fills an audio stream buffer used with tone generator

When a virtual device service is used and a hearing test is started, the
VirtualDeviceService function,
IVirtualDeviceServiceCallbacks::start_tone_generator_audio_stream is
called.

getAncCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IAncCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the ANC capability to be used for getting and setting the
ANC mode on a device..
If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
a nullptr will be returned.

getAncMode() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAncCapability
Get the ANC mode

This method returns the current ANC state of the audio device, or – if the audio device has
disconnected – the last known state.

getAudiodoTransparencyCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IAudiodoTransparency for this device service

Gets an interface to the audiodo transparency capability.
If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not
support this, then a nullptr will be returned.

getAudiogram() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the audiogram

This method can be used to get the audiogram of the profile.

getAudiosphereIrCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IAudiosphereIrCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the Audiosphere IR capability used for controlling the effect on a
device.
getBassBoostCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IBassBoostCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the Bass Boost capability used for controlling the bass boost on a
device.
getBatteryCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IBatteryCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the battery capability to be used for getting battery level.
If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
a nullptr will be returned.

getBuild() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
Get the Aspen build string.

getBuildInfo() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceInfoCapability
Get the device build info string

getCalibrationCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the ICalibrationCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the calibration capability to be used for running calibrations.
If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
a nullptr will be returned.
getChannel_count() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The number of channels.
getChannel_index() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current channel index being played, 0-indexed.
getCompensationOffset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Get compensation offset

NOTE: This API is only supported for personal sound V3.

getConfig() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Get the EQ config of the profile

getConfig() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Get a copy of the configuration object

Please note that this is only a copy of the configuration.
getConfiguration() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Get the configuration object

Get the profile created timestamp

This method can be used to get the creation time of the profile in epoch ms.

getCurrentTransparencyType() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the currently active transparency type.

getDetailEnhancerCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IDetailEnhancerCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the DetailEnhancer capability used for controlling the detail_enhancer on a
device.
getDeviceInfoCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IDeviceInfoCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the device info capability used for retrieving information regarding
the device.
getDeviceType() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceInfoCapability
Getter for the DeviceType type for this device service

getEffectPercent() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Get the detail enhancer effect percent

getEqualizerCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IEqualizerCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the Equalizer capability used for controlling the equalizer on a device.
If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
a nullptr will be returned.

getEqualizerProfileService() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
Getter for the IEqualizerProfileService.

Gets an interface to the equalizer profile service, which can be used to manage
equalizer profiles.

getFeedbackSuppressionMode() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the feedback suppression mode

Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

getFrequencies() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Get a vector with the frequencies used in the calibration.

getFrequencies() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileGraph
 
getFrequency_count() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The number of frequencies that will be played for each channel.
getFrequency_index() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current frequency index for the channel being played, 0-indexed.
getGain() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the gain setting

Note: Returns 0 if the device is not in sync yet.

getGender() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the gender of a profile

This method can be used to get the gender of a profile.

getHeadtrackCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IHeadTrackCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the HeadTrack capability used for controlling the effect on a
device.
getId() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Get the id of the profile

getId() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Get the id set on the equalizer on the audio device

A synchronous request to get the id.
getId() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the profile id

This method can be used to get the ID of a profile.

getInstance() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
 
getIntensity_count() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The number of intensities that will be played for each frequency.
getIntensity_index() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current intensity index for the frequency being played, 0-indexed.
getLastUsedTimestamp() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the last used timestamp

This method can be used to get the last used timestamp of the profile in epoch ms.

getLeft() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileGraph
 
getLeftChannel() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Audiogram
Get the audiogram for the left channel

The vector contains the hearing threshold in dbHL at
the following frequencies:
- 250 Hz
- 500 Hz
- 1000 Hz
- 2000 Hz
- 4000 Hz
- 8000 Hz
getLevel() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBatteryCapability
Get the latest battery level

Get the latest battery level received from a request.
getManager() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Aspen
Returns a reference to the singleton AspenManager.
getManufacturer() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Environment
 
getMaxCompensationOffset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Get the maximum compensation offset

NOTE: This API is only supported for personal sound V3.

A connected audio device is required.
getMaxGain() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the max gain

getMaximumVolumeLimit() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Get the maximum volume limit for the audio device

The volume limit has been measured according to the standard
BS EN 50332-1.

getMaxPresence() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Returns the max presence level

getMinCompensationOffset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Get the minimum compensation offset

NOTE: This API is only supported for personal sound V3.

A connected audio device is required.
getMinGain() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the min gain

getMode() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the mode setting

Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

getMode() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Get the configuration object

getModel() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Environment
 
getName() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Get the name of the profile

getName() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the name of a profile

This method can be used to get the name of a profile.

getNoiseSuppressorMaxReduction() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Get the maximum noise reduction for the noise suppressor

Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

getObservableEventActivateAutoResetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been activated.

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate_auto_reset request.
getObservableEventActivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Confirmation from device that audiosphere IR has been activated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate request.
getObservableEventActivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBassBoostCapability
Confirmation from device that the bass boost is activated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate request.
getObservableEventActivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Confirmation from device that the detail enhancer is activated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate request.
getObservableEventActivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Confirmation from device that the equalizer is activated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate request.
getObservableEventActivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Confirmation from device that the spatializer is activated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
activate request.
getObservableEventActivated() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The profile activated event

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies when a profile
has been activated.
To be used in the Observable's property changed method.

getObservableEventBatteryLevel() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBatteryCapability
The event for battery level

When the battery level has changed this event will be sent.

This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
a new battery level is available.
To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.

getObservableEventBypassed() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Observer event notifying that the Equalizer was bypassed

Observer will be notified with this event when the Equalizer has been bypassed.
See is_bypassed for more information.

getObservableEventBypassRemoved() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Observer event notifying that the Equalizer's bypass was removed

Observer will be notified with this event when the Equalizer's bypass has been removed.
See is_bypassed for more information.

getObservableEventCleared() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The profile cleared event

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies when a profile
has been cleared.
To be used in the Observable's property changed method.

getObservableEventCompOffsetChanged() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The compensation offset changed event

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies when the compensation offset has
changed.
To be used in the Observable's property changed method.

getObservableEventConfigureConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Confirmation from device that the a configuration was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_gain request.
getObservableEventDeactivateAutoResetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Confirmation from device that the auto-reset feature has been deactivated.

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate_auto_reset request.
getObservableEventDeactivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Confirmation from device that audiosphere IR has been deactivated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate request.
getObservableEventDeactivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBassBoostCapability
Confirmation from device that the bass boost is deactivated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate request.
getObservableEventDeactivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Confirmation from device that the detail enhancer is deactivated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate request.
getObservableEventDeactivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Confirmation from device that the equalizer is deactivated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate request.
getObservableEventDeactivateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Confirmation from device that the spatializer is deactivated

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
deactivate request.
getObservableEventDeactivated() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The personal sound deactivated event

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies when personal sound
has been deactivated.
To be used in the Observable's property changed method.

getObservableEventDifferingExistingRemoteProfile() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The event for receiving an existing remote profile with a different name

When ProfileCapability has fetched a profile from the headset that is already
in the ProfileSet but with different name, an event is sent to the IPropertyObserver
property_changed().
getObservableEventDisableVolumeLimitConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Confirmation from device that the volume limit is disabled

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
disable_volume_limit request.
getObservableEventEnableVolumeLimitConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Confirmation from device that the volume limit is enabled

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed an
enable_volume_limit request.
getObservableEventExistingRemoteProfile() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The event for receiving an existing remote profile

When ProfileCapability has fetched a profile from the headset that already exists
in the ProfileSet, an event is sent to the IPropertyObserver property_changed().

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies that event.
When receiving this event (or any other remote profile event), the ProfileCapability
is completely ready to use, in sync with the headset.

getObservableEventExtraApiSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Confirmation for a configuration set using the extra apis

getObservableEventGetVolumeLimitStatusConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Notification that the capability is in sync with device

On session establish the volume capability will synchronize with the remote
device.
getObservableEventNewRemoteProfile() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The event for receiving a new remote profile

When ProfileCapability has fetched a profile from the headset that is not already
in the ProfileSet, an event is sent to the IPropertyObserver property_changed().
The accept_profile or reject_profile functions should be used after this event in
order to decide what to do with the remote profile.

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies that event.
When receiving this event (or any other remote profile event), the ProfileCapability
is completely ready to use, in sync with the headset.

getObservableEventNoRemoteProfile() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The event for connecting to a remote device that has no profile

When ProfileCapability has connected to a headset that has no profile loaded,
an event is sent to the IPropertyObserver property_changed().

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies that event.
When receiving this event (or any other remote profile event), the ProfileCapability
is completely ready to use, in sync with the headset.

getObservableEventProfileAdded() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Get the observable event for new profiles

This event is used to notify observers whenever a new profile is
saved.
getObservableEventProfileName() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Get the observable event for profile name changes

This event is used to notify observers of any name changes to a
profile.
getObservableEventProfileRemoved() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Get the observable event for removal of profiles

This event is used to notify observers whenever a profile is removed.
The subject is the ID of the profile that got deleted.

getObservableEventProfileSet() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
The remote profile set event

This event is a confirmation of a set_remote_profile request.
getObservableEventReceivedAncMode() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAncCapability
The event for when an audio device's ANC state has been received from the headset

When AncCapability has connected to a headset with Audiodo ANC support, the device's
ANC state is requested.
getObservableEventResetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Confirmation from device that the head tracking orientation has been reset.

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
reset request.
getObservableEventSaveConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Confirmation from device that the equalizer was saved

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
save request.
getObservableEventSetAncMode() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAncCapability
The event for when an audio device's ANC state has been set

When set_anc_mode() has been successfully completed, this event is sent to
the IPropertyObserver property_changed().

This method can be used to get the string constant that identifies the event.

getObservableEventSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Confirmation from device that audiosphere IR configuration was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_config.
getObservableEventSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBassBoostCapability
Confirmation from device that the bass boost strength percent was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_strength_percent request.
getObservableEventSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Confirmation from device that the detail enhancer effect percent was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_effect_percent request.
getObservableEventSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Confirmation from device that the equalizer configuration was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set or reset request.
getObservableEventSetConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Confirmation from device that the spatializer mode was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_mode request.
getObservableEventSetStateConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Confirmation from device that the state has been set.

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_state request.
getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014FogConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 FOG transparency type has been set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_type_ansi3_22_2014_fog request.
getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014RtsConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 RTS transparency type has been set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_type_ansi3_22_2014_rts request.
getObservableEventSetTypeAudiodoConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Confirmation from device that the Audiodo personalization transparency type has been set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_type_audiodo request.
getObservableEventSetTypeGenericConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Confirmation from device that the Generic transparency type has been set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_type_generic request.
getObservableEventSetTypeNalNl2Confirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Confirmation from device that the NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type has been set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_type_nal_nl2 request.
getObservableEventSetVolumeLimitConfirmation() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Confirmation from device that the volume limit was set

Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
set_volume_limit request.
getObservableEventSyncComplete() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Notification that the capability is in sync with device

On session establish the transparency capability will synchronize with the remote
device.
getObservableEventSyncComplete() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Notification that the capability is in sync with device

On session establish the equalizer capability will synchronize with the remote
device.
getObservableEventSyncComplete() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Notification that the capability is in sync with device

On session establish the spatializer capability will synchronize with the remote
device.
getObservableEventVolumeLevel() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceInfoCapability
The event for volume level

When the volume level has changed this event will be sent.

This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
a new volume level is available.
To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.

getOs() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Environment
 
getPositionHandles() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPositions
Get the position handles

getPositions() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Get the EQ positions of the profile

getPresence() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Returns the current presence level

getProfile(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerProfileService
Get a copy of the stored profile by id

A synchronous operation to fetch a copy of a profile with a matching id.
getProfile(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Get a copy of a profile's data from its id

This method retrieves a copy of a profile's data from the set.

getProfileCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Getter for the IProfileCapability for this device service

Gets an interface to the profile capability to be used for e.g.
getProfileGraph() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData
Get the profile graph

This method can be used to get the hearing profile graph of a profile.

getProfileId() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data
Getter for the profile ID.

getProfiles() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerProfileService
Get a copy of all the stored profiles

A synchronous request to fetch a copy of a vector containing the profiles.

getProfiles() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Get a list of all profiles

This method returns a list of all available profiles.
getProfileService() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
Getter for the IProfileService.

Gets an interface to the profile service, which can be used to manage
profiles.

getProgress() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Get calibration progress

getProgressData() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Get detailed calibration progress data

The function can be used to get more detailed information regarding the
progress of a calibration.
getPsVersion() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Getter for personal sound version

If there is no connection to an audio device, the function will return version UNKNOWN.

getRemoteProfile() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Get the profile retrieved from the remote device

If a headset has a profile loaded when Aspen connects to it, ProfileCapability
will download it, and this method lets the Aspen user access that profile.
It is not valid (and the return value will be NULL) until any existing profile
has been downloaded.

When ProfileCapability has connected and downloaded the profile, if one exists,
one of four events will be posted to the PropertyObserver, signalling that this
data is available.
- If get_observable_event_no_remote_profile() is posted, no profile is available.
- If get_observable_event_new_remote_profile() is posted, a new profile is available.
- If get_observable_event_existing_remote_profile() is posted, a profile is available
that is already present in the ProfileSet.
- If get_observable_event_differing_existing_remote_profile() is posted, a profile
is available is already present in the ProfileSet, but with a different name.

getResult() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Returns the calibration result

Returns a result if a calibration has been completed.

getRightChannel() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Audiogram
Get the audiogram for the right channel

The vector contains the hearing threshold in dbHL at
the following frequencies:
- 250 Hz
- 500 Hz
- 1000 Hz
- 2000 Hz
- 4000 Hz
- 8000 Hz

IAncCapability - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
The ANC capability

This class is an interface to the ANC capability available on a DeviceService.
It can be used to set a headset's ANC on, off, and in transparency mode, as well as
getting the current state.

The caller should implement a subclass of IPropertyObserver to get the asynchronous
result of some of the method calls in this class.

The Profile service

The ProfileService class implements Aspen's observable pattern, so it is possible
for a user to subclass IPropertyObserver to get updates about changes.

PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY - com.audiodo.aspen.Gender

previous_unchecked() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileDataList.Iterator
 
processingOn() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Get the sound processing status, on/off

This method allows the Aspen user to check whether a connected headset has
its sound processing on or off.
It is not valid (and it will report "off") until any existing profile has been
downloaded.

When ProfileCapability has connected and downloaded the profile, if one exists,
one of four events will be posted to the PropertyObserver, signalling that this
method will be reliable.
- get_observable_event_no_remote_profile()
- get_observable_event_new_remote_profile()
- get_observable_event_existing_remote_profile()
- get_observable_event_differing_existing_remote_profile()

ProfileData - Class in com.audiodo.aspen
Class representing the meta data of a profile

A profile is a calibration result along with some meta data, this class only represent the meta data and a graph
of the calibration result.
ProfileData(long, boolean) - Constructor for class com.audiodo.aspen.ProfileData

propertyChanged(String, String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IPropertyObserver
The observer's notification callback.

This method is called whenever an observed object has changed.
A class that inherits from this class must implement this method.
The two strings passed into the method are defined completely by the
observable class in question, so for an exact description of what to
expect, see the documentation for those classes.

A common usage could be that the event string contains information
about what has happened, and the subject can contain e.g.
PROTOCOL_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED - com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause
Protocol version of device is higher than that of client.

R

REAR_LEFT - com.audiodo.aspen.SpeakerPosition
 
REAR_RIGHT - com.audiodo.aspen.SpeakerPosition

This method can be used after a new or differing profile has been fetched from
the device.

Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.

remoteDeviceInSync() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability

remoteDeviceInSync() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Check if remote device status is up to date

This method allows the Aspen user to check if the remote device status is in sync,
i.e.
remoteDeviceInSync() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.

remoteDeviceInSync() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.

Request a battery level update

This method is used to request a new battery level update.
A notification will arrive via IPropertyObserver registered in this capability
when a new level is available.

Close the current session

Function to inform connected device that the client wants to
close the current session.

reset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
 
reset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Reset the configuration of the equalizer.

This method resets the equalizer configuration to default.
The effect is the same as calling set with all gains set to zero.
reset() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Resets the head tracking orientation

An asynchronous request to reset the head tracking orientation.
reset(boolean) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Reset the transparency config

Note: Requires an active session with an audio device.

Resets the transparency configuration to its default values.
Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_configure_confirmation if any changes
occurred.

resetExtraApis() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Resets the extra API back to the default configuration

The extra apis include toggling noise_suppressor, toggling feedback_suppression, set max noise
reduction and set feedback suppression mode.

Observers will be notified with multiple events of type get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

resetManager() - Static method in class com.audiodo.aspen.Aspen
 
restartFrequency() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Restart frequency test

This function allows a user to restart the test of a frequency.
It is only possible to restart on a frequency, not on a specific tone.
By tone is meant a frequency with an amplitude.
Which frequency that is restarted depends on the current progress:
- If playing the second tone or more, the current frequency is restarted
- If playing the first tone of a frequency, the previous frequency is restarted
- If playing the first tone of a frequency on the second ear, the last frequency
on the previous ear is restarted

It is not possible to restart the frequency when playing the first tone on the first
frequency on first ear.
The user can restart the previous frequency until the first frequency on first ear.

resume() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Resume an interrupted calibration

Resumes an interrupted calibration if everything is OK again.
RoomId - Enum in com.audiodo.aspen
 
RUNNING - com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityStatus
Calibration is running

S

save() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Persistent save of the configuration

Saves the equalizer configuration on the audio device together
with the currently set id on the audio device.

This should be used after set to make the changes persistent.
save(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerCapability
Persistent save of the configuration for the id

An asynchronous request to save the configuration and the
passed in id persistently on the audio device.
saveProfile(EqualizerProfile) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerProfileService
Save an EqualizerProfile

This is a synchronous operation which may take some time due to saving to disk.

If the id of the EqualizerProfile matches the id of an existing EqualizerProfile, the EqualizerProfile
will be updated.
saveProfile(String, long, Gender, ICalibrationResult) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Save profile to profile set

This method saves a profile to the profile set in the profile service, and
handles all administration concerning the saving.

Tx send callback called when Aspen wants to send data

Callback called by Aspen when a DeviceService wants to send data
to its audio device counterpart.

sessionTerminated(IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceServiceCallbacks

Called when the DeviceService has terminated a session due to a cause specified in the
supplied argument.

setAncMode(AncMode) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAncCapability
Set ANC mode on the audio device

This method sets the ANC on the connected remote audio device to the desired state.

A successful operation will result in an event in the observer's propertyChanged()
method.
setChannel_count(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The number of channels.
setChannel_index(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current channel index being played, 0-indexed.
setCompensationOffset(byte) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Set compensation offset

NOTE: This API is only supported for personal sound V3.

NOTE: If called when the corresponding Aspen state already is as expected, the method
will return true and also send the matching event; the rationale is that if the caller
wants to do this action, there might be follow-up logic that the caller expects to be
done in the event handler that wouldn't be executed if we just silently returned.

A successful operation will result in an event in the observer's property_changed()
method.
setConfig(AudiosphereIrConfig) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiosphereIrCapability
Set a configuration for the audiosphere IR

An asynchronous request to set a new audiosphere IR configuration.
Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

setConfigAndPositions(EqualizerConfiguration, EqualizerPositions) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Set the EQ config and EQ positions of the profile

setEffectPercent(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDetailEnhancerCapability
Set the detail enhancer effect percent

Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

setExperience(boolean) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data
Setter for specifying whether the customer has experience with hearing aids.

Set Feedback Suppression Mode

Note: This function requires a license.

The number of frequencies that will be played for each channel.
setFrequency_index(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current frequency index for the channel being played, 0-indexed.
setGain(int) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Set a gain

An asynchronous request to set a gain value in dB for the transparency.
setIntensity_count(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The number of intensities that will be played for each frequency.
setIntensity_index(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityProgressData
The current intensity index for the frequency being played, 0-indexed.

Lock and unlock the noise suppression value to the gain

Note: This function requires a license.
setMaxNoiseReduction(long) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Set max noise reduction

Note: This function requires a license.
setMode(SpatializerMode) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ISpatializerCapability
Set the spatializer mode

setName(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
Set the name of the profile

setPresence(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets the presence level

The valid range is 0 to AudiosphereIrConfig::get_max_presence().
Values outside the valid range will be clamped.

setProfileName(ProfileData, String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileService
Set the name of a profile

Update the name of an existing profile.
setRemoteProfile(String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability
Set the remote profile

This method sets the profile on the connected remote device.
setRoomId(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets the active room configuration

The room ID refers to a predefined configuration built into the firmware.

setSpeakerAngle(SpeakerPosition, short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets the angular position of a speaker relative to the listener

The valid range is -180 to 180 degrees.
setSpeakerAnglesDerivedFromFrontRight(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets all the angular positions for all four speakers derived from the front right angle

This sets all four angles based on Audiodo's default recommendation.
The valid range is 0 to 90 degrees.
setSpeakerConstellation(SpeakerConstellation) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets the active speaker constellation

Selects which predefined speaker layout configuration to use.

setSpeakerGain(SpeakerPosition, short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Sets the gain level of a speaker

The valid range is 0-100.
setState(HeadTrackState) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IHeadTrackCapability
Set the HeadTrackState

An asynchronous request to set the state of the HeadTrackCapability.
setStrengthPercent(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IBassBoostCapability
Set the bass boost strength percent

Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

setTonalLanguage(boolean) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data
Setter for specifying if the user uses a tonal language.

setTypeAudiodo(AudiodoTransparencyMode, String) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Set Audiodo personalization transparency type

An asynchronous request to set Audiodo personalization transparency type.

It will use the profile to perform personal sound compensation
on the transparency audio.

When enabling Audiodo personalization, the gain ranges may update as there is typically
a lower maximum gain allowance while a personalization is in effect.
setTypeGeneric(AudiodoTransparencyMode) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Set Generic transparency type

An asynchronous request to set Generic transparency type.

Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_type_generic_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

setTypeNalNl2(AudiodoTransparencyMode, IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data, Context) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
Set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type

An asynchronous request to set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type.
setVolumeLimit(short) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
Set the volume limit

If the volume limit is set higher than the maximum of the device,
the request will go through and the volume limit will be set to the max.

An asynchronous request to set the volume limit value.
Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_volume_limit_confirmation
when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

setWallsPresent(boolean) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AudiosphereIrConfig
Enables or disables the presence of walls

the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.

supportsProfileService() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager

This method returns a bool indicating if the profile service is supported by
the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.

supportsSessionClose() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
Returns a bool signifying whether the session can be closed by Aspen

Function will always return false for devices not supporting that Aspen closes the session

supportsSpatializerCapability() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService

T

toneNotPlaying() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapabilityCallbacks
Signals that a tone has stopped playing

Signals that a tone has stopped playing in the audio device.
This should stop any animation or similar.
tonePlaying(CalibrationCapabilityProgressData) - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapabilityCallbacks
Signals that a tone is playing and contains progress data

Signals that a tone is playing in the audio device.

Returns a string representation of the object's state

toString() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerPositions
Returns a string representation of the object's state

TRANSPARENCY - com.audiodo.aspen.AncMode
The ANC is in transparency mode.
TWS_ROLE_HANDOVER - com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceServiceCallbacks.SessionTerminationCause

UNDEFINED - com.audiodo.aspen.AncMode
The ANC mode is undefined; either the headset hasn't reported
it, or the headset failed to report it properly.
UNKNOWN - com.audiodo.aspen.CalibrationCapabilityAbortReason
Abort reason not known, some older firmwares does not report why the calibration was aborted
UNKNOWN - com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceInfoCapability.VolumeType
 
UNKNOWN - com.audiodo.aspen.PersonalSoundVersion
 
userPressedNo() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Called when a user pressed no

Updates the calibration runner with the information that the user pressed no.
"tone_not_playing"-callback will be called when the tone has stopped playing.
userPressedYes() - Method in class com.audiodo.aspen.ICalibrationCapability
Called when a user pressed yes

Updates the calibration runner with the information that the user pressed yes.
"tone_not_playing"-callback will be called when the tone has stopped playing.
